summary: Iteration 36 - Testing Venue + Pitch + Home Factor Fixes. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed HOME/Away labels and pitch info display correctly.
passed_tests: RR at Barsapara (Guwahati) shows team1_home=true (secondary home ground)
DC at Arun Jaitley (Delhi) shows team1_home=true
Venue + Pitch + Home factor returns non-zero logit_contribution
Pitch data present: pitch_type, avg_first_innings, batting_first_win_pct, pace_assist, spin_assist
H2H uses reasonable data range (total=6 for DC vs GT, not 20+)
Bowling Depth shows bowler_count=5 for each team
All 8 categories present with weights and logit_contributions
Prediction probability in valid range with model='8-category-v2'

frontend_verification.home_away_labels: VERIFIED - HOME/Away labels display correctly in Venue + Pitch + Home factor
frontend_verification.pitch_info_line: VERIFIED - Pitch type, avg first innings, pace/spin assist values display below venue factor
matches_tested: ipl2026_013 (RR vs MI at Guwahati) - RR shows HOME
ipl2026_017 (PBKS vs SRH at Mohali) - PBKS shows HOME
ipl2026_014 (DC vs GT at Delhi) - DC shows HOME

critical_code_review_comments: HOME_GROUNDS now correctly uses lists for secondary venues (e.g., rajasthan royals: ['sawai_mansingh', 'barsapara'])
_is_home() correctly checks if venue_key is in the team's home venues list
TOSS_LOOKUP includes complete pitch data for all venues including barsapara (Guwahati)
Frontend PreMatchPredictionBreakdown.js correctly displays HOME/Away labels and pitch info line
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule and squad data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 complete. All venue/pitch/home fixes verified: (1) Secondary home grounds work correctly (RR at Guwahati shows HOME), (2) Pitch data (pitch_type, avg_first_innings, pace_assist, spin_assist) present in API response and displayed in UI, (3) HOME/Away labels display correctly in frontend, (4) H2H uses reasonable data range (5-7 matches for recent seasons), (5) All 8 categories produce meaningful values.

secondary_home_grounds.description: RR at Barsapara (Guwahati) correctly shows team1_home=true. HOME_GROUNDS uses lists for secondary venues.

pitch_data_in_api.description: All pitch fields present: pitch_type='pace-friendly', avg_first_innings=171, batting_first_win_pct=44%, pace_assist=0.6, spin_assist=0.3

home_away_labels_ui.description: Frontend displays HOME/Away labels in Venue + Pitch + Home factor section

pitch_info_line_ui.description: Frontend displays pitch info line below venue factor: 'pace-friendly | Avg 171' and 'Pace 0.6 | Spin 0.3'

h2h_reasonable_range.description: H2H total matches in reasonable range (6 for DC vs GT, not 20+)

toss_impact_nonzero.description: Toss Impact returns non-zero logit_contribution based on venue-specific toss_win_pct

bowling_depth_top5.description: Bowling Depth uses top 5 bowlers only (bowler_count=5 for each team)
